title: The Spectral Representation of a Stationary Time Series
description: A visual explanation showing how a stationary time series can be decomposed into its constituent sinusoidal frequencies, linking the time domain to the frequency domain.
relationships: The Time Domain Signal (Xt) is a sum of its underlying Sinusoidal Components
The Power Spectral Density f(ω) shows the contribution (power/variance) of each frequency ω to the overall signal
The Autocovariance Function γ(h) and the Power Spectral Density f(ω) are a Fourier Transform pair
